description:
With E.3 landed, the following in ir_inline.rs are unused (only
inline_single_use_conts family remains):

- pub fn inline_module
- pub fn inline_calls_once
- pub fn inline_tail_calls_once
- pub fn is_inlinable
- pub fn is_pure_tail_caller
- pub fn alpha_rename
- pub fn absorb_callee
- helpers consumed only by the above

Delete them. ir_inline.rs becomes a thin module containing only
inline_single_use_conts and its helpers.

## Acceptance

- ir_inline.rs LOC drops by ~70%.
- No external references to the deleted fns.
- All 842 tests + goldens green.

## Removes

The bulk of ir_inline.rs.
title: fz-CO.E.4 — Delete ir_inline::inline_module and helpers
